title: Weapon Range in Space
summary: Understanding effective weapon ranges in vacuum combat.
details: Projectiles travel indefinitely in vacuum but hit probability decreases with range. Factors limiting effective range: target motion prediction accuracy, projectile travel time, targeting sensor precision. Lasers limited by: beam dispersion, power, and target reflectivity. Missiles limited by: fuel, guidance capability, countermeasure exposure time. Maximum range is not effective range - engage within effective envelope.
annotations: Effective range varies by weapon and target type.
